sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2574" key="ai)no/futa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνό-φυτα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n2574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plants of praise</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ph.Epic.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:9:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
